title: castilleja stenophylla
intro: Castilleja stenophylla, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a hemiparasitic plant, obtaining its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of surrounding vegetation. The medicinal properties of Castilleja stenophylla have been used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and promoting wound healing.
